title: AML Network Pretraining Lab
summary: Pretrain graph representations on transaction networks to improve suspicious-entity detection with less labeled data.
knowledge_base: User: AML investigators and model risk partners.
Primary pain: labeled transaction rings are scarce, limiting supervised graph performance.
Decision output: improved entity prioritization and investigation queue quality.
Business impact: higher suspicious recall with less manual review waste.

app_modules.label: AML 01
app_modules.title: Network Priority Score
app_modules.description: Score a transaction cluster using pretrained graph signals before analyst review.

app_modules.label: AML 02
app_modules.title: Queue Quality Review
app_modules.description: Compare the pretrained model against the prior supervised-only baseline.

app_modules.label: AML 03
app_modules.title: Investigator Brief
app_modules.description: Generate the case brief for the next suspicious network review.
